description: Letter fragment from the Yeshiva directed to 'all the communities of Israel in Palestine and in its fortresses, its town and villages...which have remained in Palestine and to those in the land of Egypt calling themselves Palestinians', i.e. to the Jewish communities of Palestine and Egypt, dating from the end of the 10th or the beginning of the 11th century.
description_he: שבר מכתב מהישיבה 'לכל קהילות ישראל בארץ ישראל ובמצרים המכנים עצמם ארץ ישראלים'. סוף המאה ה-10 או ראשית ה-11.
